If you work within the NHS you are permitted to use this content for non-commercial purposes. If, however, you work within the NHS and you wish to use the content for commercial purposes, or you do not work within the NHS and you wish to use the BNF and BNFc content (this includes copying, storing in any medium, including any other website, distributing, transmitting, re-transmitting, broadcasting, modifying or showing in public), this requires the express permission of the BNF publisher.
18.8 NICE Clinical Knowledge Summaries
In respect of the content on the NICE Clinical Knowledge Summaries site (content on all pages within the domain https://cks.nice
